title: Frequently Asked Questions | Able Care
description: Common questions about Able Assess, our technology, pricing, integration, and data security.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Elderly gentleman relaxing at home with family
blocks.headline: Frequently asked questions.
blocks.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Able Assess, from hardware to HIPAA.

faqs.question: What is Able Assess?
faqs.answer: Able Assess is a digital functional health assessment platform that enables any care worker to capture four gold-standard clinical metrics — grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed, and timed up and go — in under five minutes. Results are scored against age-matched normative data and delivered instantly to the care team.

faqs.question: What hardware is required?
faqs.answer: Able Assess uses a clinical-grade Bluetooth dynamometer and an iPad or Android tablet. Hardware is provided as part of your subscription, pre-configured and ready to use out of the box.

faqs.question: How accurate is it compared to clinical-grade equipment?
faqs.answer: Our dynamometer meets ISO 7500-1 calibration standards and correlates to within 2% of the Jamar — the gold standard in grip strength measurement. All four metrics have been validated in peer-reviewed studies.

faqs.question: Does it require clinical training to administer?
faqs.answer: No. The app guides the user step-by-step through each assessment with clear visual instructions. Most care workers become proficient in under 15 minutes. No specialist clinical training is required.

faqs.question: What is the Able Strength app?
faqs.answer: Able Strength is our patient-facing grip strength app, available on iOS and Android. Patients can self-administer grip strength assessments at home and compare results to age-matched global norms. Results can be shared with their care team.

faqs.question: Does it integrate with our EHR?
faqs.answer: Yes. Able Assess offers HL7 and FHIR compliant APIs and integrates with major EHR platforms including PointClickCare, MatrixCare, and Epic. Custom integrations are also available.

faqs.question: How long does deployment take?
faqs.answer: Typical deployment takes 2-4 weeks from contract signing to first assessment. This includes hardware provisioning, integration setup, and staff training.

faqs.question: Can we run a pilot first?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a 30-day pilot programme with full hardware, training, and support. Most organisations convert to a full subscription after seeing the data from their pilot.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: We offer a straightforward annual SaaS subscription based on the number of active users or patient census, depending on your setting. Hardware, training, and ongoing support are all included.

faqs.question: Are there any setup fees?
faqs.answer: No setup fees. Hardware, onboarding, and training are included in your subscription.

faqs.question: What is the minimum contract length?
faqs.answer: Our standard agreement is 12 months. We also offer multi-year discounts for organisations ready to commit.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted end-to-end (TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest) and stored in ISO 27001-certified, HIPAA and GDPR compliant data centres. We undergo annual SOC 2 Type II audits.

faqs.question: Where is patient data stored?
faqs.answer: We offer regional data residency in the US, UK, and EU. Your data stays in your region and is never transferred without your explicit consent.

faqs.question: Is Able Assess FDA approved?
faqs.answer: Able Assess is FDA Listed as a Class I medical device. It is also CE Marked for European markets.

blocks.heading: Still have questions?
blocks.bodyText: Our team is happy to answer anything we haven't covered here.
